title: Florida Medicaid CMHC Landscape — Rate Benchmarking Report
subtitle: How the CMHC sector compares to the broader Florida Medicaid market

sector_summary.description: This report benchmarks the Florida Community Mental Health Center (CMHC) sector against the broader Florida Medicaid market. It covers all CMHCs billing Medicaid fee-for-service claims through professional servicing clinicians during 2024.
sector_summary.key_finding: The CMHC sector systematically collects less per claim than the broader Medicaid market on several key behavioral health codes, with gaps ranging from 7% to 20% below the All FL Medicaid median.

report_tone_rule: This report presents market-level observations. It does not diagnose causes or recommend actions for individual organizations.
